  "description": "Rekopel Resources Limited is a fast growing hospitality outfit providing our guest with unique and exemplar hospitality services over the past few years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Operations Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities


	The ideal candidate MUST have adequate and reasonable years of experience in hospitality management and most importantly departmental operation.


The ideal person shall:


	Support and work with all heads if department in all aspects of running the hotel.
	Monitor the coordination between all departments for smooth for smooth and efficient operations.
	Ensure the implementation of SOP in all departments and checks the same during routine checks.
	Coordinate regular operations team meeting with all head of department.
	Responsible for all aspects of department, identify staff training needs and regular training of staff.
	Monitor and maintain operational and overhead cost.
	Responsible for the overall management of the operation of the hotel Monitor purchases and request of all departments randomly inspect the store ,kitchen etc for compliance with laydown rules.


Requirement


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: christybosed123@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of email",

Hotel Operations Manager Job at Rekopel Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Rekopel Resources Limited is a fast growing hospitality outfit providing our guest with unique and exemplar hospitality services over the past few years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Operations Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities


	The ideal candidate MUST have adequate and reasonable years of experience in hospitality management and most importantly departmental operation.


The ideal person shall:
     

            
    




	Support and work with all heads if department in all aspects of running the hotel.
	Monitor the coordination between all departments for smooth for smooth and efficient operations.
	Ensure the implementation of SOP in all departments and checks the same during routine checks.
	Coordinate regular operations team meeting with all head of department.
	Responsible for all aspects of department, identify staff training needs and regular training of staff.
	Monitor and maintain operational and overhead cost.
	Responsible for the overall management of the operation of the hotel Monitor purchases and request of all departments randomly inspect the store ,kitchen etc for compliance with laydown rules.


Requirement


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 / month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Abbey Mortgage Bank Plc
content:
Abbey Mortgage Bank Plc is the premier, largest and most profitable, non-aligned Primary Mortgage Bank in Nigeria. Abbey is one of the seven national Primary Mortgage Banks (PMB) licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria and Federal Mortgage Bank of Nigeria (FMBN). The recent recapitalization exercise saw the downsize from 105 mortgage banks to only 34 now surviving. We not only emerged successfully capitalized but one of the few that also met our National obligation as well as amongst the public liability companies.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Investor Relations Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Lead investor relations and stakeholder engagement activities.
	Coordinate investor meetings, earnings calls, AGMs, roadshows, and market communications.
	Prepare investor presentations, annual reports, earnings materials, and regulatory disclosures.
	Support capital raising transactions and monitor market, shareholder, and analyst activities.
	Ensure compliance with NGX, SEC, and other regulatory requirements while providing investor insights to Management and the Board.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5-8 years of relevant experience, including at least 3 years in Investor Relations, Corporate Finance, Treasury, Financial Reporting, or Capital Markets.


Professional qualifications:


	(ACA, ACCA, CFA, CIS, Or CIMA) are an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of the Nigerian capital market, financial reporting, corporate governance, and regulatory requirements.
	Excellent communication, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.


Eligibility:


	Current experience in a commercial bank.
	Experience in a publicly quoted (PLC) organisation, preferably a listed financial Institution.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Commercial Banking Officer

Job Locations: Abuja, Delta, and Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for experienced and target-driven Commercial Banking Officers to drive business growth, customer acquisition, deposit mobilization, and revenue generation.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive deposit mobilization and achieve assigned growth targets.
	Identify and acquire new customers While maintaining
	strong relationships With existing clients.
	Aggressively market the Bank's products and services to drive customer acquisition and revenue growth.
	Cross-sell and up-sell banking products to maximize profitability.
	Monitor Customer portfolios and ensure excellent service delivery.
	Prepare business performance reports and perform other duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in any relevant discipline.
	3-5 years of experience in Commercial Banking, Business Development, Sales, or Relationship Management.
	Proven track record in deposit mobilization and customer acquisition.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Results-oriented with the ability to meet targets.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) HR Business Partner

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Define and implement People & Culture strategies aligned with business goals.
	Lead workforce planning, talent forecasting, and organizational design.
	Manage end-to-end employee lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, development, engagement, and offboarding.
	Drive performance management and leadership development initiatives.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labor laws and internal policies.
	Support organizational change and cultural transformation programs.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field; advanced degree or HR certification preferred.
	5-8 years in strategic HR roles, ideally in financial services or banking.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor law and HR best practices.
	Experience in change management, work- force planning, and performance management.
	Commercial banking experience is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Case Manager",
  "description": "AXA Mansard is one of the foremost Financial Institutions in Nigeria, that has been offering world class financial services over the years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Case Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Objective


	Ensures enrollee&rsquo;s are managed according to internationally acceptable clinical guidelines while also ensuring cost efficiency
	Responsible for the facilitation of effective coordination and continuity of care as enrollee transitions across providers and specialists.


Educational /Professional Qualifications


	MBBS from a reputable tertiary institution.
	Possession of an MBA, MPH or other of similar equivalence will be an added advantage


Experience:


	Must have&nbsp; 3 &ndash; 5 years of total work experience (Clinical experience)


Key Skills &amp; Competencies Requirements


	Case Management (Admitted enrollees, usually when they are there or discharged recently. It is a care management and control process)
	Hospital Visitation when indicated
	Care follow up and counselling when indicated &ndash; virtual or physical visit
	Care approval and follow up for complex and intensive care cases
	Ensuring care is in line with applicable benefits and following up on approvals and patient care progress.
	Scheduling patients for major and highly specialized procedures
	Care review for admitted patients and complex cases requiring secondary and tertiary care
	Holding clinical meetings monthly to discuss cases and adjust protocols where necessary for better/improved outcomes when required
	Investigate the root cause of death of an enrollee at a partner hospital
	Identify quality gaps that may have occurred in the care of the enrollee and provide recommendations to the hospital to prevent a reoccurrence
",

Case Manager Job at AXA Mansard




        
    

        
        AXA Mansard is one of the foremost Financial Institutions in Nigeria, that has been offering world class financial services over the years.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Case Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Objective


	Ensures enrollee’s are managed according to internationally acceptable clinical guidelines while also ensuring cost efficiency
	Responsible for the facilitation of effective coordination and continuity of care as enrollee transitions across providers and specialists.


Educational /Professional Qualifications
     

            
    




	MBBS from a reputable tertiary institution.
	Possession of an MBA, MPH or other of similar equivalence will be an added advantage


Experience:


	Must have  3 – 5 years of total work experience (Clinical experience)


Key Skills & Competencies Requirements


	Case Management (Admitted enrollees, usually when they are there or discharged recently. It is a care management and control process)
	Hospital Visitation when indicated
	Care follow up and counselling when indicated – virtual or physical visit
	Care approval and follow up for complex and intensive care cases
	Ensuring care is in line with applicable benefits and following up on approvals and patient care progress.
	Scheduling patients for major and highly specialized procedures
	Care review for admitted patients and complex cases requiring secondary and tertiary care
	Holding clinical meetings monthly to discuss cases and adjust protocols where necessary for better/improved outcomes when required
	Investigate the root cause of death of an enrollee at a partner hospital
	Identify quality gaps that may have occurred in the care of the enrollee and provide recommendations to the hospital to prevent a reoccurrence
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Personal Assistant Job at Gbenga Badejo & Co




        
    

        
        Gbenga Badejo and Co - Our client is a reputable investment and property development company committed to delivering innovative investment solutions and quality real estate services.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant
Job Location: Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Manage the Chairman’s calendar, meetings, and appointments
	Handle correspondence, calls, emails, and confidential documents
	Coordinate travel arrangements, site visits, and client meetings
	Prepare memos, reports, presentations, and minutes of meetings
	Liaise with clients, consultants, government agencies, and vendors on behalf of the Chairman
	Support marketing activities and social media promotion for company projects
	Provide customer assistance and follow-ups on real estate inquiries
	Perform other executive and administrative duties as assigned


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 0-3 years of experience
	Strong organizational, communication, and interpersonal skills
	High level of discretion, professionalism, and integrity
	Proficient in MS Office, email, and social media platforms
	Pleasant personality with excellent customer relations skills
	Experience in real estate, sales, or corporate admin is an added advantage
	Must reside in Maryland or in close proximity to Maryland


Salary
N170,000 - N200,000 monthly.
